skip_reason: Individual Snapchat Spotlight post URLs are not permanently stable - the storyId in the URL can change or the specific post can be removed/replaced over time, which would break this test unpredictably even though the bookmarklet itself still works. Skipping until a guaranteed-stable public Spotlight post URL is identified.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __scSpotlightModal) titled 'Snapchat Spotlight Data'. Reads JSON-LD script tags (looking for a SocialMediaPosting node in '@graph', or falls back to regex on 'uploadDate'/'datePublished'/'contentUrl'). Shows Upload Date and Date Published each with dual ISO+local format and 🚨 if within 7 days, plus a direct link to the media. Export row has Copy Data/JSON/CSV buttons plus Extracted timestamp pinned at right. Alerts 'No date data found on this page.' if neither date is found.
